name: Fried Catfish
recipeIngredient: 2 cups cracker meal or coarsely crushed unsalted crackers
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the catfish of any skin or membrane. Stir the garlic powder, salt, and pepper together in a small bowl. Sprinkle the mixture over both sides of the fillets. Dredge the fillets in the cracker meal, pressing gently so the meal sticks to both sides of the fillets. Shake off the excess and set the fillets aside.
2. Heat the oil in a large heavy skillet over medium heat until a small amount of cracker meal sizzles when dropped into the oil. Carefully place the fillets into the skillet and fry, turning once, until the fillets are cooked through and golden brown on both sides, about 8 minutes. Remove from the skillet and drain on paper towels before serving.
